notes: Moves Pi 4 composite and Pi 5 HDMI playback to zero-copy DRM Prime hardware decoding to reduce stutter and CPU use.
Restores automatic full-resolution Pi 5 HDMI transcoding, including 4K HEVC with a 1080p fallback.
Speeds Tube TV channel tuning with a shorter tune delay, lower-latency HLS buffering, and a closer live edge.
